TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Seediq Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://trv.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: = Sa'aniwan = Gaga mniq Taytung Cngkungcn ka alang Sa'aniwan. 153 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 303 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 91% niqan 275 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 9% niqan 28 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Amis86%, ni rahuq na o4%.
S.PHON: = sa'aniwan = gaga mniq tajtuŋ ʦŋkuŋʦn ka alaŋ sa'aniwan. *** sapaħ ka knəəgu na sapaħ, *** ħiji ka kana knħbɾagan na ħiji. tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *** ħiji sp, ɾaħuq na uxaj tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal *% niqan ** ħiji koia. kana ka kləəgan səəɟiq ga, amis**%, ni ɾaħuq na o*%.
S.FORM: = Sa'aniwan = Gaga mniq Taytung Cngkungcn ka alang Sa'aniwan. 153 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 303 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 91% niqan 275 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 9% niqan 28 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Amis86%, ni rahuq na o4%.
S.PHON: = sa'aniwan = gaga mniq tajtuŋ ʦŋkuŋʦn ka alaŋ sa'aniwan. *** sapaħ ka knəəgu na sapaħ, *** ħiji ka kana knħbɾagan na ħiji. tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *** ħiji sp, ɾaħuq na uxaj tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal *% niqan ** ħiji koia. kana ka kləəgan səəɟiq ga, amis**%, ni ɾaħuq na o*%.
